PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-18-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:

Nora Aponte-Woodring, Esq., in court, for Petitioner.

At the court's query, counsel offers testimony the proposed fiduciary's signature to verify their own petition. Counsel confirms that there are no known objections to this petition and that all efforts to find heirs at law have been exhausted. The court and counsel discuss the defective notice. At conclusion of discussion, the court confirms that it is satisfied with counsel's report.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Jul-23-2019 is admitted to probate. Mark A. Shustoff is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Michael Kasolas is appointed Probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Nov-05-2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cabrera. Not Reported.
